meta.title: What do eclipses look like in space?
meta.description:
What if you were to board a spaceship and view a solar eclipse from different points in space? 

Sign up for your FREE trial of the Great Courses Plus here: http://ow.ly/tYxe30eJvcL

The Great Courses Plus is currently available to watch through a web browser to almost anyone in the world and optimized for the US market. The Great Courses Plus is currently working to both optimize the product globally and accept credit card payments globally.

Show your support on Patreon - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Solar Telescope from my friends at OPT - 
https://www.optcorp.com/coronado-pst-40mm-f-10-1-0a-h-alpha-telescope.html

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/
